## On my mind

- **Brand voice automation pipeline**: Alice keeps returning to the idea that her brand voice should be codified into a reusable skill so any team member can ship copy that sounds like her. (a20260118.012, a20260120.034, a20260122.078)
- **Database migration for v3**: A persistent infrastructure thread, asking how to roll out the schema migration without breaking webhooks for existing customers. (a20260119.005, a20260121.020)
- **Hiring decision: senior PM vs senior eng**: Three weeks of back-and-forth on which role unblocks the team faster. No commitment yet. (a20260120.060, a20260124.001)

## Problems I'm solving

- **Q1 OKR gap**: Customer activation rate flat at 18%. Alice spent Tuesday building a teardown of the onboarding funnel and proposing two fixes: instrumentation gap on step 3, and copy revisions on the welcome email. (a20260120.022, a20260120.045)
- **Webhook deduplication**: Customers reporting double-charges from a retry-loop bug. Patch is shipped but Alice keeps thinking about the underlying idempotency issue. (a20260121.060, a20260123.014)
